# harness_fme_large_segment (Data Source)

Look up a Harness FME (Split) large segment by name. The workspace is resolved from `org_id` and `project_id` via Workspaces.ResolveWorkspaceID. After create, Get can return 404 briefly; this data source retries for a short period.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Large segment name in Split.
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Large segment description.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `large_segment_id` (String) The Split large segment ID (same as `id`).
- `traffic_type_id` (String) Split traffic type ID for this large segment.
